description: The seed document contained '待审核，暂不计入正式选课' blocking annotation on 金芳's BIO101 enrollment. Deleting that annotation reveals a valid enrollment. BIO101 and CourseOffering(103, BIO101) should be inserted.
note: This case uses seed_doc_c08.txt as the starting document rather than the standard seed_doc.txt. The modified_doc removes the blocking '待审核' system note from the BIO101 enrollment record.
